html:
Exclusive to:

The Deck Illuminator is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter and requires 1 set of Boards, 2 Ropes and 4 Flint to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.

The Deck Illuminator can be deployed on a Mast or Winged Sail. It is mutually exclusive with the Lightning Conductor. It provides up to 6 minutes of light and can be fueled with the same efficiency as a Campfire. Unlike Fire Pits, Wavey Jones will extinguish it instantly no matter how much Fuel it has, rather than reducing it by one stage at a time.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Shellbound Deck Illuminator skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from November 18, 2021 to December 2, 2021.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Shellbound Deck Illuminator
The beauty of the sea will guide your way with this iridescent lamp.

Trivia

  • The Deck Illuminator was introduced in the Troubled Waters update.

Gallery

  • A Deck Illuminator when on top of a mast.
  • A Deck Illuminator when on top of a mast.
  • A Deck Illuminator on a mast on a boat in-game during day
  • A Deck Illuminator on a mast on a boat in-game during night
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“I'm full of bright ideas.”
–Wilson
“Alternatively, I could just set the mast on fire.”
–Willow
“Put fire up high. Is safer that way.”
–Wolfgang
“A meager light to combat the darkness.”
–Wendy
“LIGHT-PRODUCING MAST UPGRADE”
–WX-78
“I'm always in need of a good reading light.”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll lighten things up around here.”
–Woodie
“Far more practical than setting a fire on our boat.”
–Maxwell
“We shall keep the flame burning bright!”
–Wigfrid
“Now our boat has a light!”
–Webber
“It does lighten the mood considerably.”
–Warly
“Night light”
–Wormwood
“One less thing cluttering up our deck.”
–Winona
“A light to lead us through the night.”
–Wortox
“Tall boat light!”
–Wurt
“I guess it's safer than having a campfire on the deck...”
–Walter
“I feel a little better now.”
–Wanda
The Deck Illuminator is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter and requires 1 set of Boards, 2 Ropes and 4 Flint to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.
The Deck Illuminator can be deployed on a Mast or Winged Sail. It is mutually exclusive with the Lightning Conductor. It provides up to 6 minutes of light and can be fueled with the same efficiency as a Campfire. Unlike Fire Pits, Wavey Jones will extinguish it instantly no matter how much Fuel it has, rather than reducing it by one stage at a time.

Emits Light. |tier = 20 |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "mastupgrade_lamp_item"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I'm full of bright ideas. |willow = Alternatively, I could just set the mast on fire. |wolfgang = Put fire up high. Is safer that way. |wendy = A meager light to combat the darkness. |wx78 = LIGHT-PRODUCING MAST UPGRADE |wickerbottom = I'm always in need of a good reading light. |woodie = That'll lighten things up around here. |maxwell = Far more practical than setting a fire on our boat. |wigfrid = We shall keep the flame burning bright! |webber = Now our boat has a light! |winona = One less thing cluttering up our deck. |warly = It does lighten the mood considerably. |wortox = A light to lead us through the night. |wormwood = Night light |wurt = Tall boat light! |walter = I guess it's safer than having a campfire on the deck... |wanda = I feel a little better now. |choose = wx78 }} The '''Deck Illuminator''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is found in the [[Seafaring Filter]] and requires 1 set of [[Boards]], 2 [[Rope]]s and 4 [[Flint]] to craft, and a [[Think Tank]] to prototype. The Deck Illuminator can be deployed on a [[Mast]] or [[Winged Sail]]. It is mutually exclusive with the [[Lightning Conductor]]. It provides up to 6 minutes of [[light]] and can be [[Fuel|fueled]] with the same efficiency as a [[Campfire]]. Unlike [[Fire Pit]]s, [[Wavey Jones]] will extinguish it instantly no matter how much Fuel it has, rather than reducing it by one stage at a time. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Other Items Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Shellbound Deck Illuminator''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from November 18, 2021 to December 2, 2021.
